name: Frag Grounds
short_description: Immerse yourself in the classic military shooter experience or obliterate your foes with state-of-the-art, prototype equipment such as plasma rifles or remotely controlled mechs in this dynamic FPS.
detailed_description:
Join the Discord server!

Frag Grounds is a first-person shooter game that incorporates the classic game modes for fast-paced competition, as well as a more strategy-oriented Conquest mode - conquer vast open maps by taking control of vital facilities and construct vehicles and acquire hi-tech gadgets that will bring doom upon the enemy's ranks and headquarters.

Enjoy the game with your friends, or become the sole survivor fighting off never-ending hordes of enemies in the singleplayer Survival mode!


Teams aren't always equal, as each one will have their pros and cons - in a robot vs human setting, robots may be faster and tougher and use heat vision. The human team, however, has their own tricks up their collective sleeve, be it regenerative abilities, highly coveted by the robotic lifeforms, or hi-tech, customizable equipment.

Change or adapt your strategy at any given time by making use of the weapon attachment system - swap your reflex sight for a tactical scope, put on a suppressor or a muzzle brake for quieter or steadier firing, and more.
